name: better-life
description: Better Life by Zenyth — multi-vertical wellness platform (Phase 1: foundation + content spine)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @better-life/emails && npm run build -w @better-life/cms && npm run build -w @better-life/web
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && npm run migrate
